note: Un-mined Cognee retrievers: agentic/summary/lexical/jaccard/NL. shared/algorithms lives at skill root not mcp_server.

claim: ReAct-style agent loop: LLM emits structured AgentStep (tool_call|final_answer), tools execute with ACL gating, results append to context, iterate to max_iter then force best-effort final answer. memory_context is a static mode router with zero tool-calling.

After resolving retrieved edges->text, LLM-summarize before returning (summarize_text + dedicated prompt). We enrich with metadata/anchors/validation but never compress content (only token-budget truncation, which drops not compresses).

EXTENDS: lexical retriever parameterized by injectable tokenizer/scorer callables + lazy-init/caching + heapq top-k. Our channels are hardcoded (vectorSearchFn/ftsSearch/bm25Search/graphSearchFn) with no injection API; this is the ChannelPlugin generalization.

EXTENDS CG-pluggable-lexical-architecture: token-set Jaccard + frequency-aware multiset variant (sum-min/sum-max) + stopword filter. We have BM25+FTS5 but neither set-Jaccard nor its multiset variant. Concrete instance of the pluggable channel.

NO-TRANSFER as-is (needs reframe): NL->LLM Cypher from schema introspection->execute->on empty/error feed prior attempt as negative feedback->retry. Assumes entity-node graph introspection (MATCH (n) UNWIND keys(n)) which our memory-ID graph can't support; retry-with-feedback transferable but schema introspection needs SQL-table-reflection reframe.
